message:
fix: detect new golden cases not in blessed baselines

Both fnx_baseline_invariants.rs and fnx_differential_report.rs silently
ignored new golden cases that weren't in the blessed baseline files.
Now they emit warnings when new cases are detected, making it clear
that BLESS_BASELINE=1 or BLESS_DIFFERENTIAL=1 needs to be run.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
